questions.question: Product team требует real-time dashboard с обновлением каждые 5 секунд и query latency под 200ms. Сейчас используется BigQuery (query time 3-15 sec). Решение?

options.text: OLAP engine (ClickHouse/Pinot): Kafka → ClickHouse (Kafka engine для real-time ingestion). Materialized views для pre-aggregation. Query latency: 10-100ms. BigQuery остаётся для batch analytics и ad-hoc queries

questions.explanation: BigQuery не предназначен для sub-second queries с 5-sec refresh. OLAP engine: ClickHouse принимает данные из Kafka в real-time, materialized views pre-aggregate → query за 10-100ms. BigQuery + ClickHouse = batch analytics + real-time dashboards. Caching (c) — workaround, не решает freshness.

questions.question: API endpoint для metrics: 1000 concurrent users, каждый запрашивает 'revenue by region last 24h'. Raw table: 100M events/day. Как обеспечить p99 под 100ms?

options.text: Scan raw table каждый раз — 100M rows за 100ms невозможно

Pre-aggregation: materialized view hourly_revenue_by_region (24 rows/day × N regions). Query = scan ~100 rows → under 1ms. Caching layer (Redis, TTL=60s) для hot queries. Result: handle 1000 concurrent with sub-ms query + cache

questions.explanation: Pre-aggregation: 100M raw → 24 × N_regions hourly aggregates. Query over aggregates: scan hundreds of rows → milliseconds. Redis cache (TTL=60s): 1000 users reading same metrics → cache hit ratio 99%+. Two-layer optimization: pre-aggregate + cache = sub-ms for most requests.
